parser_claim: Cantonese permits an overt person subject followed by a numeric age expression without an overt copula in attested clauses.
exact_locator: Unit 28, printed p. 146; Kéuih jauhlèih yah seui ge la and Kéuih sèhng sei’ah seui...
source_proposition: The reference gives overt-subject age clauses whose predicate contains a numeral and 歲 without 係.
implementation_effect: Retain a narrow age-measure profile.
forbidden_inference: Do not generalize from age to arbitrary NP predicates or all measures.

parser_claim: Age expressions can also occur with an understood subject in a same-topic sequence.
exact_locator: Unit 4, printed p. 19; Ngóh giu Mary, gām lín sahp-baat seui...
source_proposition: The age phrase occurs in a sequence where the first-person subject is stated once and then understood.
implementation_effect: Keep overt-subject predication distinct from discourse subject omission.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer a hidden subject token or claim every bare age phrase is a complete context-free clause.

parser_claim: Currency amount expressions can stand as short transactional utterances.
exact_locator: Unit 28, printed p. 146; Yeh-nǵh m&n, mgōi
source_proposition: A bare currency amount is presented as a transactional utterance.
implementation_effect: Represent bare amount expressions independently of subject-predicate clauses.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that currency unit 蚊 is an ordinary noun head in the runtime QuantityNP schema.

parser_claim: Price statements may contain overt 係 before a currency amount.
exact_locator: p. 556, example (20): 係一百蚊嚟㗎
source_proposition: A corpus example overtly marks a price amount with 係.
implementation_effect: Do not encode price predication as categorically copula-less.
forbidden_inference: One overt-係 example does not prove that 係 is obligatory or establish a free alternation rate.

parser_claim: Cantonese scalar questions distinguish numeric amount expressions from dimensional predicates.
exact_locator: Unit 24, printed p. 127; 幾多錢, 幾多歲, 幾長
source_proposition: The reference treats price, age, and length questions as related question phrases with different overt lexical material.
implementation_effect: Preserve dimension and unit identity instead of one undifferentiated nominal predicate.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat all scalar domains as one syntactic template merely because English uses how.

parser_claim: No inspected source directly establishes the runtime’s generalized subject + bare price amount declarative template.

source_proposition: Attested bare amounts and overt-係 price statements do not directly prove the exact runtime declarative profile.
implementation_effect: Keep the price profile provisional and separately research it.
forbidden_inference: Do not promote the accepted fixtures themselves as linguistic evidence.

parser_claim: No inspected source directly establishes the runtime’s subject + area-measure expression template.

source_proposition: General measure-phrase evidence does not establish this exact copula-less area predicate.
implementation_effect: Keep area predication as an explicit source gap.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer productivity from real-estate discourse or unit semantics alone.

parser_claim: No inspected source directly establishes the runtime’s subject + length measure + dimensional predicate template as one NominalPredicateClause rule.

source_proposition: Length questions and comparison examples support the components but not the exact declarative wrapper.

forbidden_inference: Do not infer the exact runtime parse from an English translation or related measure construction.

parser_claim: The runtime unifies age, price, area, and length under one node despite different lexical units, subject restrictions, and evidentiary status.
source_proposition: The parser has four hand-bounded profiles rather than a source-established productive class.
implementation_effect: Split domain-specific profiles or use a theory-neutral measure-predication relation.
forbidden_inference: Do not present the implementation umbrella as a standard Cantonese construction.

parser_claim: Only the age profile is directly source-linked at the exact clause level; price, area, and length require separate research and representation.
source_proposition: Evidence supports narrowing, not promotion of the umbrella.
implementation_effect: Retain age narrowly; split and quarantine the others pending direct evidence.

parser_claim: A quantity expression such as 好多 can directly modify a visible nominal head such as 嘢.
exact_locator: Unit 13, printed p. 67; Yahpbihn yáuh hóu dō yéh
source_proposition: The reference contains the transparent sequence quantity expression + overt noun within a full existential clause.
implementation_effect: Retain the narrow visible-head QuantityNP profile.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer all numeral/measure expressions belong to this NP schema.

parser_claim: Cantonese classifier research distinguishes Num-CL-N, CL-N, and bare N schemata rather than one unrestricted quantity-plus-head rule.
source_proposition: The implemented HPSG analysis separates overt classifier/noun configurations and their interpretations.
implementation_effect: Keep classifier-bearing NPs separate from direct quantifier+noun expressions.
forbidden_inference: Do not import the HPSG ontology wholesale or erase regional variation.

parser_claim: Numeral-classifier-noun and classifier/noun ellipsis patterns require overt-structure and discourse distinctions.

implementation_effect: Do not use QuantityNP as a catch-all for measure phrases or classifier ellipsis.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer a silent noun in every bare measure expression.

parser_claim: The accepted bare 三十蚊 amount does not match the runtime’s declared quantity + visible head noun example 好多嘢.

implementation_effect: Realign bare currency amounts to MeasureExpression or a bounded amount fragment.
forbidden_inference: Do not call a unit a lexical noun head merely to preserve the current label.

parser_claim: No inspected source supports the accepted 佢三蚊 parse as a context-free QuantityNP.

parser_claim: QuantityNP should be restricted to transparent quantity + overt nominal-head material and separated from bare amount/measure expressions.
source_proposition: External evidence supports the visible-head profile and distinct classifier/measure structures.
implementation_effect: Narrow the label and realign amount fixtures in a future authorized implementation.
forbidden_inference: Do not change parser behavior during this checkpoint.

parser_claim: Cantonese has postposed approximators 咁上下 and 左右 after a number and, where present, its classifier.

source_proposition: The guide explicitly contrasts postposed 咁上下/左右 with preposed approximators.
implementation_effect: Support marker-specific postposed approximation patterns.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that all approximation markers share the same position or syntax.

parser_claim: 大約 and 差唔多 occur before the number, whereas 咁上下 and 左右 occur after it.
source_proposition: The guide states a positional contrast among approximation expressions.
implementation_effect: Split approximation by marker and position.
forbidden_inference: Do not model approximation as one freely permutable slot.

parser_claim: The attested 三日左右 is a complete approximate duration expression and does not require a recovered noun head.
source_proposition: A numeral plus temporal unit plus 左右 is presented as an independent duration phrase.
implementation_effect: Allow bounded measure expressions without fabricating an object noun.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every approximate measure phrase is an object NP.

parser_claim: No inspected authoritative source attests the exact post-classifier approximation use of 度 in 七杯度.
source_proposition: Searches recovered locative 度 and other approximators, but not the runtime’s exact marker use.

parser_claim: ApproximateQuantity requires a marker/position/scope split, with the accepted 度 family retained as a direct-source gap.

parser_claim: Bare 幾錢呀 is attested as a Cantonese price question in a corpus dialogue.
